expectations.text: All state files were loaded fresh (stories.json, progress.md, CLAUDE.md)
expectations.evidence: Phase 1 Load State table shows stories-basic.json READ, progress.md READ, but CLAUDE.md marked 'SKIPPED' with note 'Not re-read (project instructions already in context)'. The assertion requires all three files to be loaded fresh; CLAUDE.md was not re-read.

expectations.text: Exactly one story was executed per invocation
expectations.evidence: Phase 3: 'Selected: EVAL-001'. EVAL-002 blocked by EVAL-001 and skipped. Only EVAL-001 implemented in Phase 5.

expectations.text: All files in story.files were read BEFORE making changes
expectations.evidence: Phase 5 Step 1: 'Read prism-eval/src/data/mock-data.ts (119 lines)' before Step 2: 'Add comment block at top (SIMULATED)'

expectations.text: Quality gates were run before any commit attempt
expectations.evidence: Phase 6 shows both quality gates executed ('typecheck: OK PASS', 'lint: OK PASS') before Phase 7 (Commit SIMULATED)

expectations.text: Commit was atomic (one story = one commit, or simulated as such)
expectations.evidence: Phase 7: Single git add + git commit for prism-eval/src/data/mock-data.ts with message '[EVAL-001] Add eval test comment to mock-data.ts'

expectations.text: stories.json was updated with status complete and completedAt
Correct signal tag was used (spectrum-continue if remaining > 0)
expectations.evidence: Phase 9: 'After EVAL-001 completion: 1 complete, 1 remaining (EVAL-002). Remaining > 0: Use spectrum-continue'. Signal: '<spectrum-continue>STORY_COMPLETE: EVAL-001 - Progress: 1/2, 1 remaining</spectrum-continue>'
